meaning: n.摘要,记事表,[律] (待判决的)诉讼事件表vt.在...上附加摘要
examples: She can cite a docket of cases of endless separation.
Please carefully read reverse side of docket before signing.
Curious to see what else is on the docket for the three day shindig?
According to the docket, the matter has not yet made it to Tax Court.
